contents.00-intro.xml:
<!--
  Physical Agents OS — 2WD Robot Car
  Dimensions sourced from manufacturer datasheets and verified product listings.

  Coordinate convention (viewer-oriented, Z-up):
    -X = forward (bumper / front)   X = rear
    -Y = left                       Y = right
     Z = up

  Note: with -X as forward, RHR gives left = Z × (-X) = -Y.

  Note: bumper is at -X so it faces the viewer's default camera
  (Three.js camera dir (-1, 0.7, 1) → URDF -X side is camera-facing).

  Component sources:
    Chassis    — 220×150×3 mm acrylic (2WD kit, confirmed multiple sellers)
    TT Motor   — 70×22×18 mm body, 10 mm shaft @ ø5.3 mm (Adafruit #3777)
    Wheels     — ø65 mm × 25 mm rubber (Adafruit #3763)
    Caster     — 20 mm total height, 15.7 mm ball (Adafruit #3948)
    L298N      — 43×43×27.5 mm PCB + heatsink (Components101 datasheet)
    ESP32-CAM-MB — 27×51×15 mm combined unit (ESP32-CAM + programmer base board, PRIMARY MCU)
    HC-SR04    — 45×20×15 mm (SparkFun datasheet)
    Power bank — ø35×92 mm cylinder (SIXTHGU, estimated)
    Battery box — 80×44×22 mm (4×AA holder)

  All dimensions in meters.
-->
contents.01-chassis.xml:
<!-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <!-- CHASSIS                                                          -->
  <!-- Clear acrylic base plate: 220 × 150 × 3 mm                     -->
  <!-- Mesh: rounded body + curved front bumper arc (generated STL)   -->
  <!-- Bumper at -X (front/camera-facing), rear at +X                 -->
  <!-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <!-- base_link is the root reference frame (no visual) -->
  <link name="base_link"/>

  <!-- chassis is a child of base_link so the Inspector can select/scale it -->
  <joint name="chassis_joint" type="fixed">
    <parent link="base_link"/>
    <child link="chassis"/>
    <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
  </joint>

  <link name="chassis">
    <visual>
      <geometry>
        <mesh filename="chassis.stl" scale="1.00 1.05 1.00"/>
      </geometry>
      <material name="acrylic">
        <color rgba="0.72 0.91 1.00 0.50"/>
      </material>
    </visual>
  </link>
contents.02-motors.xml:
<!-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <!-- LEFT DRIVE MOTOR                                                 -->
  <!-- Shaft → -Y (left wheel).  rpy R_x(PI) flips shaft +Y → -Y     -->
  <!-- DC can stays along -X (front) because R_x doesn't affect X     -->
  <!-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <link name="motor_left">
    <visual>
      <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="3.14159 0 0"/>
      <geometry><mesh filename="tt_gearbox.stl"/></geometry>
      <material name="motor_yellow"><color rgba="1.00 0.85 0.00 1.00"/></material>
    </visual>
    <visual>
      <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="3.14159 0 0"/>
      <geometry><mesh filename="tt_can.stl"/></geometry>
      <material name="motor_silver"><color rgba="0.72 0.72 0.75 1.00"/></material>
    </visual>
    <visual>
      <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="3.14159 0 0"/>
      <geometry><mesh filename="tt_shaft.stl"/></geometry>
      <material name="motor_dark"><color rgba="0.35 0.35 0.38 1.00"/></material>
    </visual>
  </link>
  <joint name="motor_left_joint" type="fixed">
    <parent link="base_link"/>
    <child link="motor_left"/>
    <origin xyz="0.0400 -0.0570 -0.0110" rpy="0.0000 0.0000 0.0000"/>
  </joint>

  <!-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <!-- RIGHT DRIVE MOTOR                                                -->
  <!-- Shaft → +Y (right wheel).  No rotation needed.                 -->
  <!-- DC can along -X (toward front bumper).                         -->
  <!-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <link name="motor_right">
    <visual>
      <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
      <geometry><mesh filename="tt_gearbox.stl"/></geometry>
      <material name="motor_yellow"><color rgba="1.00 0.85 0.00 1.00"/></material>
    </visual>
    <visual>
      <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
      <geometry><mesh filename="tt_can.stl"/></geometry>
      <material name="motor_silver"><color rgba="0.72 0.72 0.75 1.00"/></material>
    </visual>
    <visual>
      <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
      <geometry><mesh filename="tt_shaft.stl"/></geometry>
      <material name="motor_dark"><color rgba="0.35 0.35 0.38 1.00"/></material>
    </visual>
  </link>
  <joint name="motor_right_joint" type="fixed">
    <parent link="base_link"/>
    <child link="motor_right"/>
    <origin xyz="0.0400 0.0570 -0.0110" rpy="0.0000 0.0000 0.0000"/>
  </joint>
contents.03-wheels.xml:
<!-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <!-- LEFT WHEEL                                                       -->
  <!-- STL: base cyl R=31mm, tread blocks 16×4 raised to R=32.5mm, W=26mm -->
  <!-- Yellow hub disc on outboard face (local +Z → world outboard for left wheel) -->
  <!-- Shaft center at Z=+11 mm so car sits flat with swivel caster    -->
  <!-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <link name="wheel_left">
    <visual>
      <geometry>
        <mesh filename="wheel.stl"/>
      </geometry>
      <material name="rubber">
        <color rgba="0.10 0.10 0.10 1.00"/>
      </material>
    </visual>
    <!-- Yellow hub disc on the outboard face (local +Z = outboard for left wheel) -->
    <visual>
      <origin xyz="0 0 0.0075" rpy="0 0 0"/>
      <geometry>
        <cylinder radius="0.022" length="0.012"/>
      </geometry>
      <material name="hub_yellow">
        <color rgba="1.00 0.85 0.00 1.00"/>
      </material>
    </visual>
  </link>
  <joint name="wheel_left_joint" type="continuous">
    <parent link="base_link"/>
    <child link="wheel_left"/>
    <!-- rpy rotates cylinder from Z-axis to Y-axis so wheel spins around Y -->
    <origin xyz="0.0400 -0.0810 -0.0110" rpy="1.5708 0.0000 0.0000"/>
    <axis xyz="0 0 1"/>
    <limit effort="2.0" velocity="15.0"/>
  </joint>

  <!-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <!-- RIGHT WHEEL                                                      -->
  <!-- Same STL as left wheel; hub at local −Z = outboard for right   -->
  <!-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <link name="wheel_right">
    <visual>
      <geometry>
        <mesh filename="wheel.stl"/>
      </geometry>
      <material name="rubber">
        <color rgba="0.10 0.10 0.10 1.00"/>
      </material>
    </visual>
    <!-- Yellow hub disc on the outboard face (local -Z = outboard for right wheel) -->
    <visual>
      <origin xyz="0 0 -0.0075" rpy="0 0 0"/>
      <geometry>
        <cylinder radius="0.022" length="0.012"/>
      </geometry>
      <material name="hub_yellow">
        <color rgba="1.00 0.85 0.00 1.00"/>
      </material>
    </visual>
  </link>
  <joint name="wheel_right_joint" type="continuous">
    <parent link="base_link"/>
    <child link="wheel_right"/>
    <origin xyz="0.0400 0.0810 -0.0110" rpy="1.5708 0.0000 0.0000"/>
    <axis xyz="0 0 1"/>
    <limit effort="2.0" velocity="15.0"/>
  </joint>
contents.04-caster.xml:
<!-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <!-- CASTER WHEEL ASSEMBLY (front-center, -X side)                   -->
  <!-- Swivel caster: square mount plate + steel fork + rubber wheel   -->
  <!-- Three parts share X/Y; stacked down from chassis underside      -->
  <!-- Floor plane: base_link Z=0, drive wheels center at Z=-0.0110,  -->
  <!--   radius=0.0325 → floor at Z=-0.0435.                          -->
  <!-- Caster wheel radius=0.0146 → center must sit at Z=-0.0289      -->
  <!-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->

  <!-- Mount plate: ~36×36×4 mm clear/steel -->
  <link name="caster_plate">
    <visual>
      <geometry>
        <box size="0.036 0.036 0.004"/>
      </geometry>
      <material name="caster_metal">
        <color rgba="0.76 0.76 0.78 1.00"/>
      </material>
    </visual>
  </link>
  <joint name="caster_plate_joint" type="fixed">
    <parent link="base_link"/>
    <child link="caster_plate"/>
    <origin xyz="-0.1200 0.0000 -0.0040" rpy="0 0 0"/>
  </joint>

  <!-- Swivel fork: thin U-bracket -->
  <link name="caster_fork">
    <visual>
      <geometry>
        <box size="0.008 0.016 0.030"/>
      </geometry>
      <material name="caster_metal">
        <color rgba="0.76 0.76 0.78 1.00"/>
      </material>
    </visual>
  </link>
  <joint name="caster_fork_joint" type="fixed">
    <parent link="base_link"/>
    <child link="caster_fork"/>
    <origin xyz="-0.1200 0.0000 -0.0149" rpy="0.0000 0.0000 0.0000"/>
  </joint>

  <!-- Swivel wheel: radius=14.6 mm, center at Z=-0.0289 so bottom     -->
  <!-- touches floor at Z=-0.0435, same as drive wheels                 -->
  <link name="caster_wheel">
    <visual>
      <geometry>
        <cylinder radius="0.0146" length="0.0145"/>
      </geometry>
      <material name="caster_rubber">
        <color rgba="0.08 0.08 0.08 1.00"/>
      </material>
    </visual>
  </link>
  <joint name="caster_wheel_joint" type="continuous">
    <parent link="base_link"/>
    <child link="caster_wheel"/>
    <origin xyz="-0.1200 0.0000 -0.0289" rpy="1.5708 0.0000 0.0000"/>
    <axis xyz="0 0 1"/>
  </joint>
contents.05-motor-driver.xml:
<!-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <!-- L298N DUAL H-BRIDGE MOTOR DRIVER                               -->
  <!-- PCB: 43 × 43 × 1.6 mm   (Components101 datasheet)            -->
  <!-- Heatsink: 20 × 12 × 20 mm aluminum block                      -->
  <!-- Caps: ø7 × 10 mm electrolytic × 2                             -->
  <!-- Terminal blocks: 8 × 18 × 8 mm blue × 3                       -->
  <!-- Full module height: ~27.5 mm                                   -->
  <!-- Visual origins are relative to link origin (PCB centre)        -->
  <!-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <link name="l298n">

    <!-- Red PCB -->
    <visual>
      <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
      <geometry><box size="0.0430 0.0430 0.0016"/></geometry>
      <material name="pcb_red">
        <color rgba="0.85 0.08 0.08 1.00"/>
      </material>
    </visual>

    <!-- Aluminum heatsink (sits on L298N IC: PCB_top + IC_body + half-sink) -->
    <!-- z = 0.0008 + 0.005 + 0.010 = 0.0158 m -->
    <visual>
      <origin xyz="0 0.003 0.0158" rpy="0 0 0"/>
      <geometry><box size="0.020 0.012 0.020"/></geometry>
      <material name="heatsink_silver">
        <color rgba="0.75 0.75 0.77 1.00"/>
      </material>
    </visual>

    <!-- Electrolytic capacitors × 2 (z = PCB_top + half-cap = 0.0058 m) -->
    <visual>
      <origin xyz="-0.0085 -0.010 0.0058" rpy="0 0 0"/>
      <geometry><cylinder radius="0.0035" length="0.010"/></geometry>
      <material name="cap_dark">
        <color rgba="0.10 0.10 0.12 1.00"/>
      </material>
    </visual>
    <visual>
      <origin xyz=" 0.0085 -0.010 0.0058" rpy="0 0 0"/>
      <geometry><cylinder radius="0.0035" length="0.010"/></geometry>
      <material name="cap_dark">
        <color rgba="0.10 0.10 0.12 1.00"/>
      </material>
    </visual>

    <!-- Motor output terminal blocks — left and right edges -->
    <!-- z = PCB_top + half-block = 0.0008 + 0.004 = 0.0048 m -->
    <visual>
      <origin xyz="-0.0215 0.006 0.0048" rpy="0 0 0"/>
      <geometry><box size="0.008 0.018 0.008"/></geometry>
      <material name="terminal_blue">
        <color rgba="0.10 0.30 0.75 1.00"/>
      </material>
    </visual>
    <visual>
      <origin xyz=" 0.0215 0.006 0.0048" rpy="0 0 0"/>
      <geometry><box size="0.008 0.018 0.008"/></geometry>
      <material name="terminal_blue">
        <color rgba="0.10 0.30 0.75 1.00"/>
      </material>
    </visual>

    <!-- Power / input terminal block — front edge -->
    <visual>
      <origin xyz="0 -0.0215 0.0048" rpy="0 0 0"/>
      <geometry><box size="0.026 0.008 0.008"/></geometry>
      <material name="terminal_blue">
        <color rgba="0.10 0.30 0.75 1.00"/>
      </material>
    </visual>

  </link>

  <joint name="l298n_joint" type="fixed">
    <parent link="base_link"/>
    <child link="l298n"/>
    <origin xyz="0.0500 0.0000 0.0050" rpy="0.0000 0.0000 -1.5708"/>
  </joint>
contents.06-power.xml:
<!-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <!-- AA BATTERY BOX (4×AA)                                           -->
  <!-- Holder: ~62 × 52 × 22 mm; mounted under chassis                -->
  <!-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <link name="battery_box">
    <visual>
      <geometry>
        <box size="0.0806 0.0442 0.022"/>
      </geometry>
      <material name="battery">
        <color rgba="0.12 0.12 0.14 1.00"/>
      </material>
    </visual>
  </link>
  <joint name="battery_box_joint" type="fixed">
    <parent link="base_link"/>
    <child link="battery_box"/>
    <!-- Z: chassis bottom (−1.5 mm) − half box (11 mm) = −12.5 mm -->
    <origin xyz="0.0460 0.0000 -0.0120" rpy="0.0000 0.0000 0.0000"/>
  </joint>

  <!-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <!-- POWER BANK (cylindrical)                                              -->
  <!-- ø16 mm × 92 mm; flush against chassis underside, spanning Y axis    -->
  <!-- Z: chassis bottom (−1.5 mm) − radius (8 mm) = −9.5 mm              -->
  <!-- Ground clearance: 21.5 mm − (9.5 + 8) = 4 mm                       -->
  <!-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <link name="powerbank">
    <visual>
      <geometry>
        <cylinder radius="0.0115" length="0.1199"/>
      </geometry>
      <material name="powerbank_blue">
        <color rgba="0.15 0.45 0.85 1.00"/>
      </material>
    </visual>
  </link>
  <joint name="powerbank_joint" type="fixed">
    <parent link="base_link"/>
    <child link="powerbank"/>
    <origin xyz="-0.0350 0.0000 -0.0110" rpy="1.5708 0.0000 0.0000"/>
  </joint>
contents.07-esp32cam.xml:
<!-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <!-- ESP32-CAM-MB  (ESP32-CAM module + USB programmer base board)    -->
  <!-- Combined unit: ~27 mm (X) × 51 mm (Y) × 15 mm (Z)             -->
  <!-- Mounted on top of chassis, front-center, camera facing -X       -->
  <!-- rpy="0 0 1.5708": child +Y → robot -X, camera points forward   -->
  <!--                                                                  -->
  <!-- Sub-visuals (all relative to link origin = PCB centre):         -->
  <!--   1. Programmer base PCB  — 27 × 51 × 1.6 mm  (black)         -->
  <!--   2. ESP32-CAM module     — 27 × 38 × 4.5 mm  (dark green)     -->
  <!--   3. Camera lens housing  — ø8 × 5 mm cyl      (dark grey)     -->
  <!--   4. Antenna trace area   — 4 × 12 × 0.5 mm    (gold)          -->
  <!--   5. USB-B micro port     — 7.5 × 5 × 3 mm     (silver)        -->
  <!--   6. Reset / IO0 buttons  — 4 × 3 × 2 mm each  (black)         -->
  <!--   7. Status LED           — ø1.8 mm × 1 mm     (red)           -->
  <!--   8. Pin headers (2 rows) — 1 × 16 × 2.5 mm   (black)         -->
  <!-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <link name="esp32_cam">

    <!-- 1. Programmer base PCB (black) -->
    <visual>
      <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
      <geometry><box size="0.027 0.051 0.0016"/></geometry>
      <material name="pcb_black">
        <color rgba="0.08 0.10 0.08 1.00"/>
      </material>
    </visual>

    <!-- 2. ESP32-CAM module on top — sits at +Z from programmer PCB   -->
    <!-- module bottom at z=+0.0008, top at z=+0.0008+0.0045=+0.0053  -->
    <!-- module is slightly shorter in Y, centred, shifted to +Y side  -->
    <visual>
      <origin xyz="0 0.0065 0.0037" rpy="0 0 0"/>
      <geometry><box size="0.027 0.038 0.0045"/></geometry>
      <material name="pcb_cam_green">
        <color rgba="0.06 0.22 0.10 1.00"/>
      </material>
    </visual>

    <!-- 3. Camera lens housing — front edge of CAM module, centred X  -->
    <!-- lens protrudes ~3 mm past the module's +Y edge                -->
    <visual>
      <origin xyz="0 0.0275 0.0055" rpy="1.5708 0 0"/>
      <geometry><cylinder radius="0.004" length="0.005"/></geometry>
      <material name="lens_dark">
        <color rgba="0.10 0.10 0.12 1.00"/>
      </material>
    </visual>
    <!-- inner lens glass (blue tint) -->
    <visual>
      <origin xyz="0 0.0272 0.0055" rpy="1.5708 0 0"/>
      <geometry><cylinder radius="0.0025" length="0.001"/></geometry>
      <material name="lens_glass">
        <color rgba="0.20 0.30 0.60 0.85"/>
      </material>
    </visual>

    <!-- 4. Antenna trace — narrow gold strip at far +Y end of module   -->
    <visual>
      <origin xyz="0 -0.0140 0.0055" rpy="0 0 0"/>
      <geometry><box size="0.004 0.012 0.0005"/></geometry>
      <material name="antenna_gold">
        <color rgba="0.85 0.70 0.10 1.00"/>
      </material>
    </visual>

    <!-- 5. Micro-USB port — on the -Y end of the programmer board      -->
    <visual>
      <origin xyz="0 -0.0270 0.0010" rpy="0 0 0"/>
      <geometry><box size="0.0075 0.005 0.003"/></geometry>
      <material name="usb_silver">
        <color rgba="0.75 0.75 0.77 1.00"/>
      </material>
    </visual>

    <!-- 6a. Reset button -->
    <visual>
      <origin xyz=" 0.0110 -0.0100 0.0020" rpy="0 0 0"/>
      <geometry><box size="0.004 0.003 0.002"/></geometry>
      <material name="btn_black">
        <color rgba="0.15 0.15 0.15 1.00"/>
      </material>
    </visual>
    <!-- 6b. IO0 button -->
    <visual>
      <origin xyz="-0.0110 -0.0100 0.0020" rpy="0 0 0"/>
      <geometry><box size="0.004 0.003 0.002"/></geometry>
      <material name="btn_black">
        <color rgba="0.15 0.15 0.15 1.00"/>
      </material>
    </visual>

    <!-- 7. Status LED (red) -->
    <visual>
      <origin xyz=" 0.0090 0.0050 0.0020" rpy="0 0 0"/>
      <geometry><cylinder radius="0.0009" length="0.001"/></geometry>
      <material name="led_red">
        <color rgba="1.00 0.05 0.05 1.00"/>
      </material>
    </visual>

    <!-- 8a. Left pin header row -->
    <visual>
      <origin xyz="-0.0120 0.0060 0.0040" rpy="0 0 0"/>
      <geometry><box size="0.0025 0.030 0.0050"/></geometry>
      <material name="header_black">
        <color rgba="0.10 0.10 0.10 1.00"/>
      </material>
    </visual>
    <!-- 8b. Right pin header row -->
    <visual>
      <origin xyz=" 0.0120 0.0060 0.0040" rpy="0 0 0"/>
      <geometry><box size="0.0025 0.030 0.0050"/></geometry>
      <material name="header_black">
        <color rgba="0.10 0.10 0.10 1.00"/>
      </material>
    </visual>

  </link>

  <joint name="esp32_cam_joint" type="fixed">
    <parent link="base_link"/>
    <child link="esp32_cam"/>
    <!-- Top of chassis = +0.0015 m; PCB half-thickness = 0.0008 m          -->
    <!-- rpy="0 0 1.5708": child +Y → robot -X, so camera faces forward      -->
    <!-- Camera lens (link y=+0.0275) lands at robot X = -0.103 - 0.0275    -->
    <!--   = -0.1305, roughly above the caster fork at X=-0.130              -->
    <origin xyz="-0.103 0 0.0023" rpy="0 0 1.5708"/>
  </joint>
